def positive_cache_object_exists_without_size_or_eviction_policy_documentation():
    rule_id = "cache_object_exists_without_size_or_eviction_policy_documentation"
    family = "maintainability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag caches that exist as long-lived process state with no documented retention policy."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
